meaning: 1. (coll.) promising; 2. likely to turn out well
sentence: 他面试表现不错，应该有戏。
pinyin: Tā miànshì biǎoxiàn bùcuò, yīnggāi yǒuxì.
english: He did well in the interview; there's a good chance he'll get it.

sentence: 农村里偶尔还能看到驴子。
pinyin: Nóngcūn lǐ ǒu'ěr hái néng kàndào lǘzi.
english: You can still occasionally see donkeys in the countryside.

sentence: 这双鞋穿起来非常贴合脚型。
pinyin: Zhè shuāng xié chuān qǐlái fēicháng tiēhé jiǎoxíng.
english: These shoes fit the shape of your feet very well when you wear them.

sentence: 这是我的私密日记，请勿翻看。
pinyin: Zhè shì wǒ de sīmì rìjì, qǐng wù fānkàn.
english: This is my private diary; please don't read through it.

meaning: 1. to infer; 2. to judge; 3. inference; 4. judgment; 5. conclusion
sentence: 他的论断缺乏足够的证据支持。
pinyin: Tā de lùnduàn quēfá zúgòu de zhèngjù zhīchí.
english: His conclusion lacks sufficient evidence to support it.
